Items.Title: 什么是孟菲斯？ | What is Memphis?
Items.Description:
为了尊重标题和您的时间，简短的回答是 -

哦，还有猫王之城。

现在，让我们了解更多:)

来源

一个快速的基线——有时，我会使用术语数据驱动/实时/事件驱动的应用程序，它们是与数据进行大量交互的应用程序，例如：

  • 收集数据
  • 更改和维护架构（摄取数据的形状）
  • 分析和丰富数据
  • 根据摄取的数据了解所需的下一个事件
  • 与第三方应用程序集成
  • 基于事件等执行操作

斗争

作为一名负责构建数据驱动应用程序的开发人员，我遇到了一些非常痛苦的挣扎，例如：

  1. 需要处理的数据源太多（每个都有其要求和 API）。
  2. 不同且复杂的模式（对于每个数据源或服务）。
  3. 转换模式并分析每个源的流数据。
  4. 对于产生和使用数据的多种服务，在某一点之后，很难理解谁在做什么。
  5. 事件的过程很难调试和排除故障。
  6. 将批处理变为实时可能既复杂又耗时。
  7. 数据管道可以在不同的团队和应用程序之间传输，很难在复杂的管道中进行协作。

请欢迎孟菲斯


孟菲斯的实力在第 2 天就显现出来了。通过为开发人员提供一个框架，他们可以将大部分业务逻辑从生产者和消费者中卸载出来，并将其嵌入到孟菲斯的站（队列）中，例如：

  • 内联架构更改和架构注册表。
  • 动态丰富和分析摄取的数据。
  • 即用型连接器和组件（类似于“Kafka”接收器），将自动拉取和推送数据。

帮助开发人员更快、更好、更快乐地开发数据驱动的应用程序！

开发优先？ 这是什么意思？
感谢您联系到这一点:)

我们尽最大努力以一种对开发人员和 DevOps 有意义的方式创建任何特性、按钮和功能，并真正帮助他们完成为期两天的任务。 举几个例子——

  1. 安装。 通过 Docker 或 K8S 的单个命令。
  2. 用户界面和 CLI。 用于更好地理解和调试数据驱动应用程序的管理工具。
  3. 故障排除和调试。 每个开发人员的生计。 使开发人员能够（通过 GUI）跟踪单个事件的完整路径。
  4. 监测。 开箱即用的能力来跟踪和了解谁是你的生产者和消费者，你做什么，以及多少。
  5. 使用任何编程语言与孟菲斯互动。 更多即将到来！

感谢您的阅读，希望对您有用。

如果缺少某些内容或含糊不清，请在评论中告诉我。

孟菲斯文档： https ://docs.memphis.dev/
不和谐 - https://discord.gg/jGkWe3wqFw
阿布舍克·贾斯瓦尔—— Apr 16 4月16日



原文:


To be respectful to the title and your time, the short answer is -

Memphis is an open-sourced dev-first event processing platform,

oh, and also the city of Elvis.

Now, let’s understand more :)

The source

A quick baseline — From time to time, I will use the term data-driven/real-time/event-driven applications, which are applications that heavily interact with data like:

  • Collecting data
  • Change and maintain schema (The shape of the ingested data)
  • Analyze and enrich data
  • Understand the required next event based on the ingested data
  • Integrations with 3rd party applications
  • Performing an action based on an event and more

The struggles

As a developer who was tasked with building data-driven apps, I had some really painful struggles like:

  1. Too many data sources to handle (Each has its requirements and API).
  2. Different and complex schemas (For each data source or service).
  3. Transform the schema and analyze streamed data per source.
  4. With multiple services that produce and consume data, after a certain point, it's hard to understand who does what.
  5. The event’s journey is hard to debug and troubleshoot.
  6. Kafka, RabbitMQ, NATS, and other MQs are HARD to deploy, manage, secure, update, onboard, and tune.
  7. Turning batch processes into real-time can be complicated and time-consuming.
  8. Data pipelines can travel between different teams and applications, hard to collaborate in complicated pipelines.

Please Welcome Memphis


Memphis delivers the most easy-to-use, deploy, and manage, k8s-native messaging queue, forked from NATS.IO, with amazing UI, CLI, and with built-in observability that allows you, the developer, to actually understand the full journey of your events.

RabbitMQ has Queues, Kafka has Topics, and Memphis has Stations.

The strength of Memphis reveals on day 2. By providing a framework for developers where they can offload most of the business logic out of the producers and consumers and embed it inside Memphis’ station (queue) like:

  • Inline schema changes and schema registry.
  • Enrich and analyze ingested data on-the-fly.
  • Ready-to-use connectors and components (Similar to “Kafka” sinks) that will pull and push data autonomously.

Helping developers develop data-driven apps Faster, Better, and happier!

Dev-First? What does it mean?
Thanks for reaching out to this point :)

We do our best to create any feature, button, and capability in a way it will make sense for the developer and DevOps on the other side, and really help them with their day-2-day tasks. A few examples —

  1. Installation. Single command via Docker or K8S.
  2. UI and CLI. Management tools to better understand and debug your data-driven app.
  3. Troubleshooting and Debug. The bread and butter of every developer. Enabling developers to follow (via GUI) the full path of a single event.
  4. Monitoring. Out-of-the-box ability to track and understand who are your producers and consumers, what do you do, and how much.
  5. Interact with Memphis in any programming language. More to come!

Thank you for reading, hope you find it useful.

Please let me know in the comments If something is missing or vague.

Memphis documentation: https://docs.memphis.dev/
Discord - https://discord.gg/jGkWe3wqFw
Github -https://bit.ly/3MInIMZ

Abhishek jaiswal - Apr 16
Items.Author: saar_memphis

Items.Title: Solidity 中的事件是如何工作的，为什么需要它们 | How events in Solidity work, and why are they needed
Items.Description:
网络前端、数据收集工具等各方可以监听特定事件并做出相应反应。 在这篇文章中，我们将深入探讨事件以及在类似以太坊的区块链上开发智能合约时如何使用它们。

定义事件

我们需要从event关键字开始定义一个事件。

 event TicketContractCreated ();

一个事件可以有额外的参数。 这意味着它是一个可以保存数据的结构。 数据类型与我们在 Solidity 语言中使用的相同。

 event TicketCreated ( address ticketHolder );

参数

事件结构可以保存多个参数。 我们可以命名这些参数，但这是可选的，我们可以只提供数据类型。

 event TicketCreated ( address ticketHolder , uint256 ticketId );

假设我们要在监听特定事件时过滤日志。 我们需要指定哪些参数应该被索引。 有一个限制，最多只能索引 3 个参数。 请记住，索引参数具有成本效益，并且将花费更多的汽油费来挖掘交易。

 event TicketCreated ( address indexed ticketHolder , uint256 ticketId );

发出事件

当特定动作发生时，我们可以使用emit关键字后跟事件名称来释放事件。

 emit TicketContractCreated ();

如果一个事件确实有任何参数，我们可以按照我们定义它们的顺序在括号中指定这些参数。

 emit TicketCreated ( msg . sender );

查看发出的事件

要查看发出的事件，可以使用Remix IDE 、 Etherscan区块浏览器或任何库来与以太坊（如Ethers.js 、 web3.js或任何其他链）进行交互。 如何做到这一点超出了这篇博文的范围。

我们不能只依赖交易状态。 一个事件可以保存数据，而其他事件可以过滤事件并对其做出反应，例如在 Web 应用程序中。

链接



原文:

Events in Solidity programming language help inform when something has happened in the smart contract. Parties like a web frontend, data gathering tools, and more can listen to specific events and react accordingly. In this post, we will dig deeper into Events and how to use them when developing smart contracts on Ethereum-like blockchains.

Define an event

We need to start with the event keyword to define an event.

event TicketContractCreated();

An event can have additional parameters. It means that it is a struct that can hold data. Data types are the same that we are using in Solidity language.

event TicketCreated(address ticketHolder);

Parameters

Event struct can hold multiple parameters. We can name these parameters, but that is optional, and we can provide just the data type.

event TicketCreated(address ticketHolder, uint256 ticketId);

Suppose we want to filter the logs when listening to the specific events. We need to specify which of the parameters should be indexed. There is a limit that only up to 3 parameters can be indexed. Keep in mind that indexing parameters are cost-efficient and will take more gas fees for the transaction to be mined.

event TicketCreated(address indexed ticketHolder, uint256 ticketId);

Emit the event

When a specific action has happened, we can release the event with the emit keyword followed by the event name.

emit TicketContractCreated();

If an event does have any parameters, we can specify those in the parenthesis in the same order as to how we defined them.

emit TicketCreated(msg.sender);

See emitted events

To see emitted events can use Remix IDE, Etherscan block explorer, or any library to interact with Ethereum like chains like Ethers.js, web3.js or any other. How to do that is out of the scope of this blog post.

TL;DR

Events in Solidity programming language are a great way to inform other parties that something has happened. We can't just rely on the transaction status. An event can hold data, and others can filter events and react upon that, for instance, in the web app.

Items.Title: 自动语音识别方法和挑战 | AUTOMATED SPEECH RECOGNITION APPROACHES AND CHALLENGES
Items.Description:
定义人类表现也很困难，因为人类理解他人言语的能力也各不相同。 当我们将自动识别与人类表现进行比较时，将这两点都考虑在内非常重要：识别器的性能和人类在同一语音上的表现的估计方式。” 作者 Julia Hirschberg，哥伦比亚大学计算机科学系教授兼系主任

与几十年前相比，技术发展的方式明显不同，人工智能试图通过智能系统实现机器与人类之间的有效交互。

在许多场景中，由于所谓的自动语音识别技术的持续发展，我们正在以惊人的速度继续加速向这种未来场景的演进。

什么是自动语音识别？

众所周知的例子是 youtube 隐藏式字幕、Siri 前端、谷歌助手前端、Cortana、语音邮件转录、IBM Watson 等

语音人工智能正在发展到我们生活的各个方面，现在很多人都在寻找改善分享体验的方法，比如现在的 youtube，即使你不是母语人士，这也是最好的体验，但看标题的东西可以让理解内容的工作变得顺畅考虑到人们用各种方言说一种语言。

实时隐藏字幕功能背后的技术是 ASR。 使用先进的 ASR，即使内容创建者正在讲话，任何视频的音频部分也可以被转录，使得隐藏式字幕可以随时随地轻松添加，而不会中断内容创建者的体验。

为什么所有语言都需要 ASR？

  • 为识字和不识字的人开发自然界面可以更轻松地与支持 ASR 技术的系统进行交互。
  • 语音是人类交流的主要方式，在与键盘打字进行比较时，很麻烦，对吧？ 但人类也可以自由地说话而不是打字，即使有时人们喜欢在说话时腾出双手，但我认为在某些情况下，比如开车，这不是一个好主意。

用于 ASR 开发的方法是什么？

开发 ASR 解决方案有两种常用方法：-

  1. 传统方法
  2. 现代或深度学习方法

传统方法：

这种方法涉及从声音文件创建特征：这可能需要一种过滤和聚合形式，并在窗口上执行转换，例如傅立叶变换和联结时间分类 (CTC)。 接下来是应用声学模型来匹配音素，最后一部分涉及应用语言模型，该模型使用概率分布来预测音素中的单词，然后预测音素中的单词序列。

将问题分解为这种管道形式的好处是您可以独立处理每个部分以改进系统。 然而，在实践中，这也是一个缺点，因为整个过程可能很脆弱，需要专门的研究人员。

现代或深度学习方法：

这种方法的目标是用一种算法替换中间步骤。 深度学习方法在语音转录任务中取得了最先进的结果，正在取代 ASR 中使用的传统方法。 它也更简单，因为涉及的步骤更少，并且不需要太多的专业知识。 这种方法的实施需要对PyTorch 、 Tensorflow 、 DeepSpeech等深度学习工具的知识理解。

它是如何工作的

  1. 计算机程序将语音格式转换为词的音频文件的机器可读表示的频谱图。
  2. 声学模型通过消除任何背景噪声和标准化音量来清理音频文件，这里是算法将清理后的（波形文件）音频表示分解为音素（语言和单词声音的基本构建块）的地方
  3. 自动语音识别软件使用统计概率分析序列中的音素来推断整个单词。 从序列中将 NLP 模型应用于句子以理解音频的含义，然后开发合适的回复并使用TTS转换来回复。

发展 ASR 的挑战是什么？

无论使用哪种方法，但在大多数情况下，ASR 解决方案都受到实际人类交互、我们进行沟通的方式以及用于训练 ASR 的实际数据的限制：-

  1. 风格：人类交流的方式因情况而异，会话语音不同于阅读语音，连续语音确实不同于孤立的单词。 此外，您还可以找到一些涉及语言混合物的对话，例如斯瓦希里语和最知名的SWANGLISH英语。
  2. 说话者特征：在现实世界中，交流的速度可能比机器训练的方式更快，甚至口音也可能因不同语言的说话者而异。
  3. 环境：在这种情况下，我们以背景噪声或信道条件为例
  4. 任务细节：词汇量和语言限制。

如何衡量 ASR 解决方案的成功与否？

衡量自动语音识别性能的最常用方法是使用最广为人知的单词错误率WER ，它是 ASR 模型正确识别的单词数量的百分比。

对于特定数据集的学术任务，5% 的 WER 率是可能的，但对于实际应用，10-20% 的 WER 被认为是可以接受的。 这是因为 ASR 模型是在历史数据集上训练的，这可能无法反映现代语音数据。 某些模型的另一个问题是无法处理地区口音，因为它们可能只接受来自同一地区的声音的训练。 这是某些云 ASR 服务的一个特殊问题。 通过 altviz ASR 论文

最后的想法

我们不仅限于看到 ASR 的用处，仅在语音到文本上，因为它可以应用于各个方面，转录可以用于其他 NLP 技术，包括根据用例将文本分类为不同类别，命名实体提取文本如人物、地点和组织， 自然语言理解在分析文本的含义。

请记住，人工智能从训练数据集中学习，因此当某些输入数据丢失时，ASR 无法准确解析他们的语音。 考虑为一组用户开发 ASR 解决方案的多样性是构建有效解决方案的重要部分。

此外，隐私是 ASR 广泛采用的另一个主要症结，考虑到 ASR 系统可用于办公室、家庭、车辆甚至商店或任何提供便利的环境，这取决于消费者是否信任其数据的隐私.

让机器听我们的声音是一件大事，因为它的复杂性、挑战和技术性 ASR 技术实际上只是帮助机器或计算机听我们的一个简单目标。 看起来简单或有趣，但当我们停下来思考它时，我们会意识到这种能力的真正重要性。



原文:

“The ability to recognize speech as well as humans do is a continuing challenge, since the human speech, especially during spontaneous conversation, is extremely complex. It’s also difficult to define human performance since humans also vary in their ability to understand the speech of others. When we compare automatic recognition to human performance it’s extremely important to take both these things into account: the performance of the recognizer and the way human performance on the same speech is estimated.” By  Julia Hirschberg, Professor, and Chair at the Department of Computer Science at Columbia University

The way technology evolving is significantly different compared to a few decades back, Artificial intelligence trying to bring efficient interaction between machines and human beings through intelligent systems.

In many scenarios, we’re continuing to accelerate the evolution toward this future scenario at a surprisingly fast pace thanks to the continuing development of what is known as automated speech recognition technology.

What Is Automated Speech Recognition?

Automated Speech Recognition is commonly known as ASR, refers to the technology by which a machine or program is engineered to identify spoken words or phrases and convert them to text or any other format that can be read by a machine. Well known examples are youtube closed captions, Siri front-end, Google assistant front-end, Cortana, voicemail transcription, IBM Watson, etc

Voice Artificial intelligence is growing into various aspects of our lives, many are looking for ways to improve sharing experiences like youtube nowadays, it is the best experience even if you are not a native speaker but looking at something captioned makes the work of understanding contents smooth considering people speak one language in various dialects.

The technology behind closed captioning capabilities in real-time is ASR. Using advanced ASR, the audio portion of any video can be transcribed even as the content creator is speaking, making closed captions easy to add anytime and anywhere without interrupting the experience for the content creator.

Why Is ASR Desirable For All Languages?

  • ASR contributes to the preservation of endangered languages, lots of languages are currently close to extinction or they’ve been given this endangered status, so if you have technologies that are built for such languages it can contribute towards the preservation of such languages.
  • Developing natural interfaces for both literate and illiterate people makes it easier to interact with systems enabled with ASR technology.
  • Speech is a primary means of human communication when it comes to comparison struggling with keypad typing for communication, is cumbersome, right? But also humans feel free to speak rather than type even sometimes people like to free their hands while talking but I don’t think is a good idea when it comes to some cases like driving.

What Are The Approaches Used For ASR Development?

There are two common approaches used in developing ASR solutions:-

  1. The traditional approach
  2. The modern or Deep Learning approach

The traditional approach:

This approach involves feature creation from the sound file: this may require a form of filtering and aggregation and performing transformations on the windows, such as Fourier transformations and connectionist temporal classification (CTC). The followed by applying an acoustic model to match the phonemes and the final part involve applying a language model that uses probability distributions to predict words from the phonemes and then the sequences of words from the phonemes.

The advantage of breaking the problem into this form of the pipeline is that you can work on each part independently to improve the system. However, in practice, this is also a disadvantage as overall the process can be brittle and requires specialized researchers.

The Modern or Deep Learning approach:

The goal of this approach is to replace the intermediate steps with one algorithm. The deep learning approach has achieved state-of-the-art results in speech transcription tasks and is replacing the traditional methods used in ASR. It is also simpler because there are fewer steps involved and does not require as much expertise. The implementation of this approach requires a knowledge understanding of deep learning tools such as PyTorch, Tensorflow, DeepSpeech, etc.

How does it work

  1. The computer program converts the speech format into a spectrogram a machine-readable representation of the audio file of the words.
  2. An acoustic model cleans up the audio file by removing any background noises and normalizing the volume, Here is where the algorithm breaks down the cleaned-up (wave file) audio representation into phonemes(the basic building blocks of sounds of languages and words)
  3. The Automated Speech Recognition software uses statistical probability on analyzing the phonemes in sequences to deduce whole words. From the sequences is where the NLP model is applied to the sentences to understand the meaning of the audio and then develop a suitable reply and use TTS conversion to reply.

What Are The Challenges Of Developing ASR?

Regardless of which approach is used but in most cases, ASR solutions are limited by real human interaction, the way we do communication, and the actual data used to train the ASR:-

  1. Style: The way humans communicate is varies depending on the situation conversational speech is different from reading speech, Continuous speech does vary from isolated words. Also, you can find some of the conversations involving language admixtures like Swahili and English most known as SWANGLISH.
  2. Speaker characteristics: In the real world, the speed of communication may be faster than the way machines are trained or even the accent may do vary across various language speakers.
  3. Environment: In this case, let's take an example of background noises or channel conditions
  4. Task specifics: The number of words in vocabulary and language constraints.

How Do Measure The Success Of The ASR Solution?

The most commonly used method to measure the performance of Automatic Speech Recognition is using Word Error Rate most known as WER, which is the percentage of the number of correctly recognized words by the ASR model.

For academic tasks on specific datasets, a WER rate of five percent is possible, but for real-life applications, a WER of 10-20 percent is considered acceptable. This is because the ASR models are trained on historical datasets, which may not reflect modern voice data. Another issue with some models is the inability to handle regional accents, as they may only be trained on voices from the same region. This is a particular problem with some of the cloud ASR services. By altviz ASR paper

Final Thoughts

We are not limited to seeing the usefulness of ASR, on speech to text only since it can be applied to various aspects the transcription can be used in other NLP techniques including Classification of text into different categories depending on the use cases, Named Entity Extraction on text such as people, places and organizations, Natural language understanding in analyzing the meaning of the text.

Point to keep in mind, Artificial Intelligence learns from training datasets, so when some input data are missing the ASR can’t accurately parse their speech. Considering the diversity in developing ASR solutions for a group of users is an important part of building effective solutions.

Also, privacy is another major sticking point for ASR’s widespread adoption, taking into account that the ASR system may be used in offices, homes, vehicles, and even stores or in any setting that offers convenience is contingent on consumers trusting the privacy of their data.

Making machines listen to us is a big deal, for all its complexities, challenges, and technicalities ASR technology is really just about one simple goal of helping machines or computers listen to us. Looks simple or fun but when we stop to think about it we realize just how important this capability truly is.
Items.Author: tonyloyt

Items.Title: Cloud PLM 是初创公司的新数字化转型浪潮 | Cloud PLM is the new digital transformation wave for startups
Items.Description:
世界为云技术铺平了道路，初创公司需要采用数字化转型来实现持续效率。 由于智能的进步，连接设备越来越需要更先进的云解决方案。 将产品生命周期管理 (PLM) 的云支持视为一种竞争优势，如果您是一家对产品创新有浓厚兴趣的初创公司，这篇博文是必读的。

传统 PLM 集成了企业中的数据、流程和业务系统，而 Cloud PLM 做得更多，它允许用户随时随地通过任何设备安全地访问 PLM 信息。 基于云的现代 PLM 通过简化产品开发数据和流程来帮助初创公司更快地启动，从而彻底改变了行业。

此外，当您使用云服务构建产品时，您会利用有限的 IT 资源和基础设施成本。 支持云的 PLM 将应用程序部署到可靠、高度可用的多租户云环境中，该环境可随着初创公司客户群的扩大而扩展。 无论您的创业公司是为了达到高峰、逐渐成长还是随着市场需求而建立，您都对产品生命周期有同样的需求。 因此，您可以从包括网络基础设施、软件平台、应用程序操作和支持在内的完全托管服务中受益。 在这里阅读我们的全文

本文最初由Softweb Solutions发布



原文:

The world has paved the way for cloud technology, necessitating startups to adopt digital transformation for continuous efficiency. Owing to the smart advancements, connected devices have increased calling for more advanced cloud solutions. Considering cloud-enablement for product life-cycle management (PLM) as a competitive advantage, this blog post is a must-read if you are a startup with a keen interest in product innovation.

*Why Cloud PLM for startups
*
While a traditional PLM integrates data, processes, and business systems in an enterprise, Cloud PLM is doing more by allowing users to securely access PLM information from anywhere, through any device, at any time. Modern cloud-based PLM has revolutionized the industry by helping startups launch faster by streamlining their product development data and processes.

In addition, when you build a product using cloud services, you utilize limited IT resources and infrastructure costs. Cloud PLM is an ideal solution for startups that require their global users to onboard in no time and securely access products and process data.

Cloud-enabled PLM deploys applications into a reliable, highly available, multi-tenant cloud environment that scales to match as your startups’ customer base expands. Whether your startup is aimed to reach heights, grow gradually or build up with market needs, you will have the same need for product lifecycle. Therefore, you can benefit from a fully managed service that includes network infrastructure, software platform, application operations and support. Read our full article here

This article is originally posted by Softweb Solutions

Items.Title: 我的第一个真正的项目 XeroLinux。 | My first real project XeroLinux.
Items.Description:
大家好，我是前端 Web 开发人员 Mhmd Ali。 在这篇文章中，我将分享我设计和构建我的第一个真实项目XeroLinux的过程。

它是如何开始的？

首先，我在DistroTube YouTube 频道上观看了该发行版的视频，我真的很喜欢该发行版以及它看起来如此漂亮，然后我前往官方网站下载它，我发现该网站没有和发行版一样的感觉，我认为我可以做得更好，所以我加入了XeroLinux Telegram 频道，如果他打算重新设计 XeroLinux 网站，我发了一条消息，提到了 DarkXero（XeroLinux 的创建者和维护者），答案是肯定的！

原始设计（之前）：

我的重新设计过程！

在这一点上，我用Figma制作了一个快速的 mvp，向 DarkXero 展示了我的想法，当然，从第一次开始，没有什么是完美的，所以我不断调整设计大约两周，直到我们同意下面的这个设计。

重新设计（之后）：

这个想法是让网站的外观和感觉与 Distro 特别是 XeroCerry 大米相同。

建立网站

现在是构建网站的时候了，我用 ReactJS 创建了网站，因为它是我熟悉的语言，花了大约 2 周的时间才完成。 但问题是 DarkXero 想要一种简单的方法来更新变更日志、公告、视频和常见问题解答而不更改源代码，所以我将他需要更新的所有内容都放在 json 文件中，除了弹出窗口，因为它们没有一个单一的布局或一个固定的内容，我一直在想一个解决方案，直到我想起NoteDown ，这是我在学习 JavaScript 时创建的一个工具/笔记网络应用程序，用于使用 Markdown 语法做笔记，具有许多有用的功能。 由于他知道 Markdown，我为 XeroLinux 网站配置了相同样式的 Markdown 预览工具，点击这里尝试配置的工具。

我的经验

这是一次很好的经历，我很感激我的第一个项目是我喜欢的，
我很享受在这方面的工作，DarkXero 是一个了不起的人，我很高兴我遇到了他。

感谢您的阅读，您对此有何看法？ 任何建议将不胜感激...



原文:

Hello, I'm Mhmd Ali, a Front-End Web developer. in this post I'll share my process of designing and building my first real project XeroLinux.

How it started?

First of all, I watched a video on DistroTube YouTube channel showing the distro, I really liked the distro and how it looks so nice, then I head to the official website to download it, and I realized that the website don't have the same feelings of the distro and I thought that I can do better, so I joined XeroLinux Telegram channel and I sent a message with mentioning DarkXero (the Creator and maintainer of XeroLinux) if he is planning to redesinging XeroLinux website and the answer was YES!

the original design (Before):

My redesign Process!

At this point I made a quick mvp with Figma showing my idea to DarkXero, of course no thing is perfect from the first time so I kept tweaking the design for about two weeks until we agreed on this desing below.

the Re-Design (After):

The idea was to make the website looks and feels same as the Distro specifically the XeroCerry rice.

Building the website

Now it's time to build the website, I created the website with ReactJS since it is the language that I'm comfortable, It tooked around 2 weeks to finish it. but the problem was that DarkXero wanted an easy way to update the Changelog, Announcements, Videos and the FAQs without changing the source code, so I made everything he need to update in a json file, except for the Pop Ups because they do not have a single layout or a fixed content, I kept thinking for a solution until I remembered NoteDown, this is a tool/notes web app I've created while I was learning JavaScript to take notes with Markdown syntax with many useful features. Since he knows Markdown I configured the tool to preview Markdown in the same styles for XeroLinux website, click here to try the configured tool.

My experience

It was a good experience, I'm grateful that my first project was something that I love,
and I enjoyed working on it, and DarkXero is an awesome person, I'm happy that I met him.

Thank you for reading, what do you think about it? Any advice would be much appreciate it...
Items.Author: mhmdalihsen

Items.Title: 你是业主吗？ 增强现实对您的业务的好处 | Are you a Business Owner? Augmented Reality Benefits for Your Business
Items.Description:
最近记忆中最令人兴奋的发展之一是增强现实的出现。 增强现实被定义为现实世界的物体和信息与虚拟技术的集成。 这是使用附加到您的移动设备、计算机甚至相机的应用程序来完成的。 增强现有现实的好处很多，因为它有助于使您的产品更具吸引力和吸引力，同时也让观众的注意力集中在您的产品和品牌上。

什么是增强现实？

增强现实 (AR) 技术为我们的物理世界添加了多层数字信息。 与虚拟现实类似，AR 使用现有环境并对其进行添加，而不是创建人工环境来代替真实环境。

增强现实最常见的观点来自社交媒体过滤器。 用户可以与虚拟对象实时交互，并分享自己与虚拟世界交互的图像和视频。

其他示例包括显示夜空星座的应用程序，显示家具在您家中的外观的应用程序，甚至可以让您在购买前虚拟试妆的应用程序。

这项技术是如何工作的？

它通过分析从相机传感器以及其他输入源（如 GPS 和运动传感器）接收到的数据来实现这一点。 然后对数据进行处理以创建一个复合视图，该视图使用计算机生成的元素（如图形、视频或音频）来增强物理环境（见下文）。

增强现实与虚拟现实

增强现实和虚拟现实开发经常相互混淆。 这两种技术以相似的方式发展并影响着相同的行业，但它们最终却截然不同。

增强现实将数字内容覆盖在物理世界之上，改变了我们对它的看法。
虚拟现实用用户可以与之交互的模拟世界取代了物理世界。

小型企业的 AR 应用程序

增强现实有望成为未来几年最重要的技术之一。 技术可能会改变我们与世界互动的方式，但在我们看到广泛采用之前仍有工作要做。 虽然企业刚刚开始将其实施到他们的战略中，但小型企业在将 AR 应用程序实施到他们的实践中仍然落后。

以下是如何将 AR 应用程序用于不同业务部门的快速概览：

增强现实对零售业的好处

随着电子商务市场份额的增加，零售业正面临着巨大的颠覆。 这使零售商专注于创造更好的店内体验。 他们这样做的一种方法是使用增强现实技术。 例如，宜家在其目录中实施了增强现实技术，因此客户可以在购买之前直观地看到家具在他们家中的样子。 其他公司也使用增强现实来增加店内体验或增强在线购物。

增强现实对房地产行业的好处

研究所最近的一份报告发现，AR 将在 2025 年拥有 800 亿美元的市场。 这是因为千禧一代，现在是最大的购房者群体，在购买之前已经在使用技术来研究房屋。

初创开发公司正在将 AR 技术应用于房地产，允许用户可视化不同类型的家居装修。 一家这样的公司 Smartvid.io 开发了一款应用程序，允许用户在购买房产之前设想他们可以对房产做什么，这样他们就可以避免代价高昂的错误并进行智能翻新。

增强现实对电子商务行业的好处

电子商务行业多年来一直在使用增强现实。 雷朋和丝芙兰等品牌已使用 AR 技术让购物者在购买前虚拟试用产品。

增强现实对家具行业的好处

家具行业正在使用增强现实来帮助客户做出购买决定。 毫不奇怪，这项技术正在被一个专注于做出视觉决策的行业所采用。

作为家具卖家，您可以利用增强现实技术帮助您的客户在购买之前查看他们的购买情况。 通过使他们能够将家具物品虚拟地放置在家中并在购买前查看家具的外观，您可以为客户节省金钱和时间，同时增加商店的销售额。

增强现实对旅行、旅游和酒店业的好处

旅行应用程序可以使用 AR 实时提供有关用户周围环境的信息，而无需查看地图或询问方向。

自 2009 年首次发布以来，它的下载量已超过 4000 万次。

适用于 Android 设备的 Aeropack 应用程序提供有关位置的信息，例如位于用户位置 1 公里半径内的酒店、餐馆和购物中心。

增强现实对医疗保健和医学的好处

在医学领域，AR也一直名声在外。 对于医疗保健行业，AR 承诺提供一个更精简、更高效的系统，从而改善患者的治疗效果。 目前，AR在医疗保健领域的应用方式有很多种。 许多正在开发的创新技术旨在通过使用 AR 来提高医疗保健质量。

目前， AR 开发正以几种不同的方式用于医疗保健。 该技术最常见的用途之一是协助进行医疗培训。 该技术允许学生以各种方式与解剖模型进行交互，并可视化它们的功能以及出现问题时出现的问题。

该技术允许外科医生在进行手术之前可视化内部结构，并根据他们从这些可视化中获得的信息就如何进行手术做出明智的决定。

增强现实对制造和工程行业的好处

在增强现实方面取得成功的一个领域是 CNC 编程。 只编程一个零件可能需要数天时间，而且错误可能代价高昂。 增强现实可以通过两种方式提供帮助：首先，通过在零件顶部覆盖尺寸或公差等重要信息； 其次，通过提供零件的 3D 模型供参考。

与在实际零件上工作时相比，这允许在屏幕上存储更多信息。 它通过确保在最紧张的时间（在第一次加工零件之前）轻松获得所需的所有信息来帮助防止错误。

增强现实如何使您的业务受益

过去，AR 技术一直用于军事和医疗目的，但随着最近智能手机和平板电脑的发布，AR 变得更容易为大众所接受。

使用 AR 的一个显着好处是它可以改善您的品牌形象。 以下是将这项技术融入您的业务的一些好处：

增强现实可提高您的客户保留率和营销能力

当您在线销售时，唯一能将您的产品与竞争对手的产品区分开来的就是数字屏幕。 您必须充分利用此屏幕才能脱颖而出并鼓励人们从您那里购买而不是向他们购买。

使用增强现实可以帮助您将产品变为现实，因为它使人们更容易想象自己使用它们。 他们可以看到错综复杂的细节，想象他们的感受，并了解他们可能会如何看待它们——所有这些都是直接摄影无法实现的。

我们几乎在所有事情上都使用数字设备——信息、娱乐、通信、生产力和购物。 它使您可以在您的行业中占据一个未开发的空间，并对潜在买家产生影响。

在电子商务中使用增强现实可以让您领先于游戏。 消费者越来越多地寻找身临其境的体验品牌。 增强现实是一种强大的工具，可让您占据行业中未开发的空间并对潜在买家产生影响。

一些公司已经利用了这项技术，让消费者在购买之前可以虚拟试穿产品。 当涉及到眼镜时，这尤其有用，因为佩戴不当可能会让人不舒服甚至危险。

例如，LensCrafters 的 Virtual Try-On 应用程序让客户可以用手机自拍，看看他们脸上不同的眼镜是什么样子的。 另一家眼镜公司 Warby Parker 有一个类似的应用程序，叫做“虚拟试戴”。

其他电子商务零售商使用增强现实技术让消费者在购买之前先睹为快。 例如，Wayfair 有一个名为 View in Room 3D 的应用程序，它允许用户将家具图像叠加到他们自己家的照片中。

它允许您创建一个交互式目录，以 3D 形式展示您的所有产品。

增强现实开发人员可以创建一个交互式目录，以 3D 形式展示您的所有产品。 因为我们使用产品，这对我们来说很容易做到。 我们可以展示整个产品系列，包括一些尚未生产的型号。 这使客户更容易选择他们想要的模型，并在订购给定产品的特定部件时最大限度地减少出错的可能性。

另一件非常有用的事情是能够创建视觉指南，帮助客户自己组装产品。 这是一种确保客户满意度并使客户服务员工的生活更轻松的廉价解决方案。

增强现实有助于提升您的品牌形象

当您提供交互式和个性化的购物体验时，人们会因此记住您。 客户对您商店的品牌体验越积极，他们的忠诚度就越高。 忠诚度转化为重复业务，这可以转化为您的业务更高的利润。

这很有趣，也很令人兴奋。

它是新的和不寻常的，这让消费者感到兴奋。 当他们使用 AR 与您的品牌互动时，他们会觉得自己是特殊事物的一部分——这将使他们更有可能将积极的感受与您的产品或服务联系起来。**

它增加了参与度。

当消费者使用 AR 购物或浏览您的产品或服务时，他们被迫更积极地参与您的内容，而不是被动地在网站或博客文章上阅读相关内容。 因为 AR 需要他们的眼睛和手，它可以让他们保持更长时间的联系，反过来，让你有更多的机会在情感层面与他们联系——这是电子邮件活动、社交媒体帖子和其他形式的被动营销所无法做到的

这是推广您的品牌和吸引客户的绝佳方式

想象一下，你走在街上，看到一张刚刚上映的新电影的海报。 你想了解更多关于这部电影的信息，所以你拿出手机，打开一个应用程序，把它指向海报。 在动画的一瞬间，海报在您的屏幕上栩栩如生，并开始播放电影的预告片。 这是实际应用中的增强现实 (AR)，它可以通过将您的品牌整合到他们的环境中来帮助与客户建立更牢固的关系。

结论

虽然增强现实仍处于发展阶段，但其在商业领域的应用潜力无疑令人印象深刻。 现场工作人员可以使用类似的应用程序来确保他们高效地执行工作； 甚至消费者也可以使用它来获取有关他们在商店购买的产品的相关信息。 这并不是说它是一项简单的技术——成功实施可能需要比简单地下载应用程序更多的工作，而且仍然有一些问题需要解决。 但是，如果您愿意投入必要的时间和精力，您就可以利用增强现实为您的业务带来的诸多好处。

本文最初发表于Techreviewer.co



原文:

One of the most exciting developments in recent memory is the advent of augmented reality. Augmented reality is defined as the integration of real-world objects and information with virtual technology. This is done using applications that attach to your mobile device, computer, or even a camera. The benefits of augmenting your existing reality are numerous, as it can help to make your product offerings more inviting and appealing, while also keeping audiences' attention focused on your products and brands.

What is AR?

The technology of augmented reality (AR) adds layers of digital information to our physical world. Similar to virtual reality, AR uses the existing environment and adds to it rather than creating an artificial environment to replace the real one.

The most common view of augmented reality comes from social media filters. Users can interact with virtual objects in real-time and share images and videos of themselves interacting with the virtual world.

Other examples include apps that show the night sky's constellations, those that show how furniture would look in your home, and even ones that let you try on makeup virtually before buying it.

How does this technology work?

AR technology works by superimposing virtual layers of information over the physical environment. It does this by analyzing the data received from camera sensors as well as other input sources such as GPS and motion sensors. The data is then processed to create a composite view that augments the physical environment with computer-generated elements such as graphics, video, or audio (see below).

AR vs VR

Augmented reality and virtual reality development are often confused with each other. The two technologies have grown in similar ways and influence the same industries, but they are ultimately very different.

Augmented reality overlays digital content on top of the physical world, altering our view of it.
Virtual reality replaces the physical world with a simulated one that users can interact with.

AR Applications For Small Businesses

Augmented reality is on track to be one of the most important technologies in the coming years. Technology could change the way we interact with our world, but there is still work that needs to be done before we can see widespread adoption. While businesses are just starting to implement it into their strategies, small businesses are still a ways behind in implementing AR applications into their practices.

Here is a quick overview of how AR applications can be used for different business sectors:

Augmented Reality Benefits for the Retail Sector

The retail sector is seeing a lot of disruption with e-commerce increasing its share of the market. This has made retailers focus on creating a better in-store experience. One way they are doing this is by using augmented reality technology. For example, IKEA has implemented augmented reality in their catalog so customers can visualize what a furniture item will look like in their home before they buy it. Other companies have also used augmented reality to either increase the in-store experience or augment online shopping.

Augmented Reality Benefits for the Real Estate Industry

A recent report from Institute found that AR will have an $80 billion market in 2025. That's because millennials, now the largest group of homebuyers, are already using technology to research homes before they buy.

Startup development companies are applying AR technology to real estate by allowing users to visualize what different types of home improvements would look like. One such company, Smartvid.io, created an app that allows users to envision what they could do with a property before they buy it so they can avoid costly mistakes and make intelligent renovations.

Augmented Reality Benefits for the eCommerce Industry

The eCommerce industry has been using augmented reality for years. Brands like Ray-Ban, and Sephora have used AR technology to allow shoppers to virtually try out products before making a purchase.

Ray-Ban was one of the first brands to use Snapchat's AR filters — allowing users to virtually try on glasses without ever entering a store. In November 2018, the brand took things a step further by developing an app called "Virtual Try-On" which allowed customers to virtually try on glasses using their phones' front-facing cameras.

Augmented Reality Benefits for the Furniture Industry

Augmented reality is being utilized in the furniture industry to assist customers with purchasing decisions. It’s not surprising that this technology is being adopted by an industry that’s all about making visual decisions.

As a furniture seller, you can make use of augmented reality to help your customers see their purchases before they buy them. By enabling them to virtually place furniture items in their home and see what it looks like before they make a purchase, you can save your customers money and time while also increasing the sales of your store.

Benefits of Augmented Reality for Travel, Tourism & Hospitality Industry

AR is already making a big impact on the travel, tourism, and hospitality industry.

A travel app can use AR to provide information about a user's surroundings in real-time without needing to look at a map or ask for directions.

AR can be used to provide additional information about local tourist attractions that might appeal to travelers. The Layar app adds interactive content over images viewed through a smartphone camera and makes it possible for users to find interesting locations nearby. It has been downloaded more than 40 million times since it was first released in 2009.

AR can help tourists navigate foreign cities by identifying landmarks and other features of interest as they walk down a street. The Aeropack app for Android devices provides information about places, such as hotels, restaurants, and shopping centers that are located within a 1-kilometer radius of the user's location.

Benefits of Augmented Reality for Healthcare & Medicine

In the field of medicine, AR has also been making a name for itself. When it comes to the healthcare industry, AR promises a more streamlined and efficient system that will lead to improved patient outcomes. Currently, there are many ways in which AR is being used in the healthcare sector. Many innovative technologies in development aim to enhance the quality of health care by using AR.

How AR is Used in Healthcare

Currently, AR development is being used in healthcare in several different ways. One of the most common uses of this technology is to assist with medical training. This technology allows students to interact with anatomical models in various ways and visualize how they function as well as what goes wrong when things go awry.

Another important use of AR in the medical field involves surgical procedures. This technology allows surgeons to visualize internal structures before performing surgery and make educated decisions about how to proceed based on the information they have gained from these visualizations.

Augmented Reality Benefits for Manufacturing and Engineering Industries

One area that has found success with augmented reality is CNC programming. CNC programming is incredibly complex, especially with modern 5-axis milling machines. It can take days to program just one part, and mistakes can be costly. Augmented reality can help in two ways: first, by overlaying important information like dimensions or tolerances over the top of the part; and second, by providing 3D models of parts for reference.

This allows more information to be stored onscreen than would otherwise be possible when working on an actual part. It helps prevent mistakes by making sure that all information needed is easily available during the most stressful time — right before machining a part for the first time.

How Augmented Reality Benefits Your Business

In the past, AR technology has been used for military and medical purposes, but with the recent release of smartphones and tablets, AR has become more accessible to the masses.

A significant benefit of using AR is that it can improve your brand image. Here are some of the benefits of incorporating this technology into your business:

Augmented reality improves your customer retention and marketing

When you’re selling online, the only thing separating your products from those of your competitors is a digital screen. You have to make the most of this screen to stand out and encourage people to buy from you instead of them.

Using augmented reality helps you bring your products to life because it makes it easier for people to picture themselves using them. They can see the intricate details, imagine how they feel, and get a sense of how they might look at them – all things that are impossible with straight photography.

We use digital devices for almost everything — information, entertainment, communication, productivity, and shopping. AR takes this to a deeper level by focusing on enhancing our everyday experiences through technology.

It allows you to occupy an unexplored space in your industry and make an impact on potential buyers.

Using augmented reality in e-commerce can put you ahead of the game. Consumers are increasingly looking for immersive, experiential brands. Augmented reality is a powerful tool that allows you to occupy an unexplored space in your industry and make an impact on potential buyers.

A few companies have already taken advantage of this technology, allowing consumers to virtually try on products before they buy them. This is particularly useful when it comes to eyeglasses, where a poor fit can be uncomfortable or even dangerous.

For example, LensCrafters' Virtual Try-On app lets customers take a selfie with their phones and see what different glasses look like on their faces. Warby Parker, another eyeglass company, has a similar app called "Virtual Try-On."

Other e-commerce retailers use augmented reality to give consumers a sneak peek at how something will look in their home before they buy it. Wayfair, for example, has an app called View in Room 3D that allows users to overlay images of furniture into photos of their own homes.

It allows you to create an interactive catalog presenting all your products in 3D.

Augmented reality developers can create an interactive catalog presenting all your products in 3D. Because we use products, this is easy for us to do. We can present the whole product range, including some models that are not even produced yet. This makes it easier for the clients to select the model they want and minimizes the possibility of errors when ordering specific parts of a given product.

Another thing that’s very useful is the ability to create a visual guide that helps the clients assemble the products themselves. It’s an inexpensive solution to ensure customer satisfaction and make the life of the customer service employees easier.

Augmented reality can help improve your brand image

When you offer an interactive and personalized shopping experience, people remember you for it. The more positive brand experiences customers have with your store, the more loyal they are likely to be. Loyalty translates into repeat business, which could translate into higher profits for your business.

It’s fun and exciting.

AR makes a game out of browsing. It’s new and unusual, which makes it exciting for consumers. When they use AR to interact with your brand, they will feel like they’re part of something special — which will make them more likely to associate positive feelings with your products or services.**

It increases engagement.

When consumers use AR to shop or browse your products or services, they’re forced to be more actively engaged with your content than if they were just passively reading about it on a website or blog post. Because AR requires their eyes and hands, it keeps them connected longer and in turn, gives you more opportunities to connect with them on an emotional level — something that email campaigns, social media posts and other forms of passive marketing cannot

It's a fantastic way to promote your brand and engage customers

Imagine you are walking down the street and see a poster for a new movie that has just been released. You want to know more about the film, so you pull out your phone, open up an app, and point it at the poster. In a flash of animation, the poster comes to life on your screen and begins to play a trailer for the film. This is augmented reality (AR) in action and it can help build stronger relationships with customers by integrating your brand into their surroundings.

Conclusion

While augmented reality is still in a developing stage, its potential for use in the business world is undoubtedly impressive. Applications like Layar allow retailers to share information about their products with customers; field workers can use similar apps to ensure they are performing their jobs efficiently and effectively; even consumers can use it to gain pertinent information about the products they buy at stores. That's not to say that it's an uncomplicated technology — successful implementation will likely require more work than simply downloading an app, and there are still some kinks that need to be worked out. But if you're willing to put in the time and effort necessary, you can take advantage of many of augmented reality's benefits for your business.

This article was originally published on Techreviewer.co

Items.Title: Traders Union 如何帮助您选择外汇经纪商并保护自己免受欺诈？ | How does Traders Union help you choose a Forex broker and protect yourself against scam?
Items.Description:
在国际外汇市场工作时，选择可靠的经纪商是成功不可或缺的要素，因为只有可靠和值得信赖的经纪公司才能为交易者提供优质的服务、交易的透明度、报价的准确性、专业和快捷的支持。

自 2010 年以来一直提供在金融市场工作的有利条件，包括额外收入、专业法律援助、信息支持和其他功能的最受尊敬的外汇交易商协会 Traders Union 的金融专家分享了如何选择合适的外汇经纪商并避免被骗。 此外，经过测试的最佳外汇经纪商名单已在 Traders Union 网站上提供。

选择经纪人时我需要考虑哪些因素 - TU小贴士

选择经纪人时需要考虑的关键标准列表：

  • 公司在金融市场运营的时期和历史。
  • 金融监管机构执照。
  • 快速和合格的客户支持团队。
  • 交易者对经纪人的评论。
  • 经纪人客户支持的响应时间和对客户负面评论的反应。

除上述标准外，经纪商还有许多内部指标，客户在开始与该经纪商实际合作之前无法独立研究和分析这些指标。 这些是 Traders Union 专家按照独特的算法分析的指标——一种分析和评估经纪人的方法。

因此，Traders Union 网站提供有关外汇经纪商运营及其可靠性的高度可信赖、公正的信息。

如何区分诈骗经纪人和可靠公司

为此，工会的金融专家和分析师定期在 TU 的网站上发布文章，以帮助交易者避开诈骗经纪人的诡计并立即识别此类公司。

区分诈骗经纪人和可靠公司的关键标准：

  • 该公司的网站是最近才创建的，而经纪人则提供有关金融市场多年运营的信息。
  • 该公司在没有任何金融监管机构许可的情况下运营。
  • 互联网上有很多关于公司的负面评论或根本没有信息。
  • 经纪商的网站缺乏信息，始终没有回应； 网站上没有经纪人的官方法定地址和联系方式。
  • 经纪人的客户支持过于突兀，并坚持要求客户尽快存款。

在Traders Union网站上，您将找到有关如何选择可靠的外汇经纪商以及如何避免成为诈骗受害者的更多信息。

加入交易者联盟，成为第一个获得更多外汇市场相关信息的人。 交易者在联盟中注册是免费的，而交易者联盟的成员将获得额外的收入，形式是补偿每笔平仓交易的部分价差或佣金（回扣）、合格律师的协助以及额外的奖金与外汇经纪商合作。



原文:

Choosing a reliable broker is an integral element of success when working in the international foreign exchange market, because only a reliable and trusted brokerage company can provide traders with quality service, transparency of transactions, quotation accuracy, professional and quick support.

Financial experts of Traders Union, the most respected association of Forex traders that has been providing beneficial conditions of working in the financial markets, including additional income, professional legal assistance, information support and other features since 2010, shared how to choose the right Forex broker and avoid getting scammed. In addition, the list of tested best Forex brokers is already available on the Traders Union website.

What factors do I need to consider when choosing a broker – TU tips

Traders Union recommends using an all-round method, i.e. study and analyze all areas of operation of the company that you are interested in and make a decision based on the results of your analysis.

The list of key criteria you need to take into consideration when choosing a broker:

  • Period and history of the company’s operation in the financial markets.
  • License of a financial regulator.
  • Quick and qualified customer support team.
  • Reviews about the broker by the traders.
  • Response time of the broker’s customer support and reaction to the negative reviews of the clients.

In addition to the above criteria, there are a number of internal indicators of the broker, which the client cannot study and analyze independently before starting to actually work with the said broker. These are the indicators Traders Union experts analyze following a unique algorithm – a methodology for analyzing and assessing brokers.

Therefore, the Traders Union website features highly trustworthy, impartial information about the operation of Forex brokers and also regarding their reliability.

How to tell the difference between a scam broker and a reliable company

The Traders Union team not only helps traders find a trustworthy broker, but also to distinguish a reliable company from a scam.

For this purpose, financial experts and analysts of the Union regularly publish articles on the TU’s website to help traders avoid the tricks of scam brokers and instantly recognize such companies.

Key criteria that distinguish a scam broker from a reliable company:

  • The company’s website has only been created recently, while the broker provides information about years of operation in the financial markets.
  • The company operates without the license of any financial regulator.
  • There are many negative reviews on the Internet about the company or there is no information at all.
  • The broker’s website lacks information, consistently does not respond; there is no official legal address and contacts of the broker on the website.
  • The broker’s customer support is too obtrusive and insists that the clients make a deposit as soon as possible.

On the Traders Union website, you will find more information about how to choose a reliable Forex broker and how to avoid becoming a victim of scams.

Be the first to receive more relevant information about the Forex market by joining Traders Union. The registration in the Union is free for traders, while the members of Traders Union are awarded additional income in the form of compensation for a part of the spread or commission for each closed trade (rebate), assistance of qualified lawyers and also additional bonuses for working with Forex brokers.

Items.Title: 可解释的人工智能——将人工智能的黑匣子变成玻璃盒子 | Explainable AI – Converting the black box of AI into a glass box
Items.Description:
在这个数字时代，人工智能 (AI) 解决方案已迅速普及。 在商业世界中利用人工智能的最大优势是通过机器学习 (ML) 算法使人类决策过程变得更好。 然而，随着人工智能的日益普及，人工智能系统做出的决策和预测类型必须变得更有洞察力，因为在许多情况下，它们对商业成功、人类生活和个人健康至关重要。 对于公司来说，要从大量数据中获取可解释和可操作的信息，将计算能力和 ML 能力相结合是必不可少的。

尽管人工智能系统强大到足以破译准确的答案，但我们需要知道它是如何工作的。 毕竟，盲目地依赖机器做出的决定是不明智的，除非我们知道“他们的决策背后的方式和原因”。 这就是可解释的人工智能服务出现的地方。

什么是可解释的人工智能

可解释的人工智能 (XAI) 是一种人工智能系统，它使整个决策过程变得明显、易于理解和快速。 换句话说，XAI 消除了假定的黑匣子，并阐明了估计、见解或预测，全面解释了决策是如何做出的。

有必要对人工智能驱动的决策进行澄清，因为一个错误的决策可能会导致巨大的损失。 准确地说，可解释的商业人工智能让决策者可以直接控制人工智能的运营，证明他们对预测的信任是正确的。 因此，在构建强大的可解释 AI 系统或应用程序时，必须考虑以下问题：

  • 你为什么要相信这个决定？
  • 为什么模型提供了这个决定？
  • 输入以什么方式转换为输出？
  • 要利用哪些数据源？

人工智能系统不仅要执行特定任务或强加决策，还要有一个模型，能够提供透明报告，说明为什么会得出具体结论。

可解释的人工智能是当今业务必须的原因
可解释的 AI 将成为智能系统的中流砥柱，使来自制造、银行、医疗保健、保险、SCM 等各个领域的企业能够做出防故障决策。 然而，如果我们谈论可解释的医疗保健人工智能，如果人工智能模型无法解释他们的推理，那么他们的决定或预测将受到质疑、忽视甚至否决。 因此，医疗诊断、治疗计划、自动处方等预测的背景和基本原理可能是可疑的、灾难性的和容易出错的。

使决策更加精确

企业不可能优化无法理解的决策。 如果您了解设备如何以及为什么得出某个决定，那么通过系统实验来增强它就会变得不那么复杂。 模型的可解释性越高，其优化就越系统化。 借助 XAI，您可以深入了解用于提出特定建议的数据、考虑的参数和决策点。 毕竟，XAI 消除了所谓的黑匣子，并大致阐明了决策是如何做出的。

证明考虑的因素

更高的可解释性不仅有助于做出明智的决策，包括增强 AI 模型，还有助于做出与 AI 模型输出相关的决策。 例如，如果机器学习 (ML) 系统预测消费者有 70% 的机会离开品牌，您可能希望通过保留折扣留住他们，或者系统可能会推荐以客户为中心的选项。 但是，如果客户的激励因素不是折扣而是客户服务体验的最新记录呢？ 因此，了解影响整体决策的因素对于确定可以采取哪些措施来防止客户流失至关重要。

实现公正的决策

由于 ML 系统主要依赖于数据，因此它有可能做出容易受到偏见和操纵的决策。 借助可解释的 AI，您可以通过训练模型以适应数据并做出不带偏见的决策来改进系统。

总结

总而言之，可解释人工智能旨在为企业开发智能系统，为他们提供清晰易懂的决策，这也解释了为什么某个人工智能模型会做出某个决策。 因此，当您的组织制定 AI 战略时，XAI 应该是防止不合逻辑的决策和最大化业务价值的首要考虑因素。 如果您想了解 XAI 系统如何为更好的决策提供透明的解释，请联系我们的 AI 专家。

原始来源： https ://www.softwebsolutions.com/resources/explainable-ai-for-business.html



原文:

In this digital age, artificial intelligence (AI) solutions have drastically grown in popularity. The biggest advantage of leveraging AI in the business world is to make human decision-making process better with machine learning (ML) algorithms. However, with the growing popularity of AI, the types of decisions and predictions the AI-enabled systems make must become more insightful as in many cases, they are critical to business success, human life and personal wellness. And for companies to derive explainable and actionable information from huge amounts of data, it is essential to combine computing power and ML capabilities.

Although, AI systems are powerful enough to decipher accurate answers, we need to know how has it worked. After all, it is not wise to blindly depend upon machine-made decisions, unless we know “how and why behind their decision making”. This is where explainable AI service, comes into the picture.

What is Explainable AI

Explainable AI (XAI) is an AI system that makes the entire decision-making process evident, understandable and fast. In other words, XAI removes the presumed black boxes and clarifies the estimations, insights, or predictions comprehensively explaining how the decision was made.

It is necessary to have clarification for AI-driven decisions because one wrong decision can lead to huge losses. Precisely, explainable AI for business gives decision-makers direct control over AI’s operations justifying their trust in the predictions. Hence, while building a robust explainable AI system or application, the questions given below must be considered –

  • Why should you trust the decision?
  • Why did the model provide this decision?
  • In what way is the input converted to output?
  • what data sources to be leveraged?

An AI system is not only expected to perform a certain task or impose decisions but also has a model with the ability to give a transparent report of why it came to specific conclusions.

Reasons why Explainable AI is a must for today’s business
Explainable AI is going to be the mainstay of intelligent systems, empowering enterprises from various domains such as manufacturing, banking, healthcare, insurance, SCM and more to make fail-proof decisions. However, if we talk about explainable AI for healthcare, if the AI model fails to explain their reasoning then their decision or predictions will be questioned, disregarded or even overruled. As a result, the context, as well as the rationale of prediction such as medical diagnosis, treatment plans, automated prescription, could be dubious, disastrous and error-prone.

Enable precision in decision-making

It is impossible for an enterprise to optimize decisions that are not understandable. In case, you understand how and why a device derived a certain decision then it will become less complicated to enhance it via systematic experimentation. The greater explainable a model becomes, the better systematic its optimization becomes. With XAI, you get insights into the data, parameters considered and decision points utilized to make a particular suggestion. After all, XAI eliminates the alleged black boxes and clarifies broadly how the decision was made.

Justifies factors taken into consideration

Greater explainability not only helps in making smart decisions including enhancements to an AI model but also helps in making decisions related to the outputs of an AI model. For instance, if a machine learning (ML) system predicts 70% chances that a consumer is going to leave the brand, you may want to retain them with a retention discount or maybe the system recommends customer-centric option. But what if the customer’s motivating factor isn’t discount but the most recent records of client service experiences? Hence, understanding the factor influencing the overall decision is imperative to identify what can be done to prevent customers from churning out.

Enable impartial decision-making

As ML systems majorly depend on the data there are chances that it can make decisions susceptible to bias and manipulation. With explainable AI you can improve the system by training the model to adapt to data and make unprejudiced decisions.

To conclude

All in all, explainable AI aims at developing intelligent systems for businesses to provide them with crystal clear, human-understandable decisions that also explain why a certain AI model made a certain decision. Hence, when your organization maps out AI strategies, XAI should be the prime consideration to prevent illogical decision-making and maximize business value. If you want to know how XAI systems can provide transparent explanations for better decision-making, then contact our AI experts.

Items.Title: 一个 ReactJS 钩子：useState() | A ReactJS Hook : useState()
Items.Description:
此函数获取初始状态并返回一个具有当前状态值的变量和另一个更新它的函数。

在 React 中，有两种基于类的组件和基于函数的组件。 函数式组件是接受参数作为组件属性并返回有效 JSX 的简单函数：

 function React(props) { return <div>{props.useState}</div> } // Or as an arrow function const React = (props) => <div>{props.useState}</div>

如您所见，没有状态或生命周期方法。

它们通常以关键字use开头。

如何在 ReactJS 中使用useState Hook？ 它有什么作用？

如前所述，useState 允许您向功能组件添加状态。 当您在函数组件中使用 useState 时，它​​会为该组件创建一个状态。

而在一个类中，状态总是一个对象，而 Hooks 的状态可以是任何类型。 每个状态项都包含一个值，它可以是对象、数组、布尔值或您能想到的任何其他类型。

那么，什么时候使用 useState Hook 比较合适呢？ 它对本地组件状态特别有效，但较大的项目可能需要使用额外的状态管理方法。

在你的 React 应用中声明{ useState } 。

要在您的应用程序中使用 UseState 挂钩，只需键入以下代码：

 import React, { useState } from 'react';

您可以直接传递它，如前面的示例所示，或者使用函数来初始化变量。

 const Message= () => { const message = useState( () => helloWorld() ); }

初始值只会在第一次渲染时分配，如果它是一个函数，它只会在第一次渲染时被调用。

因为它的参数只在第一次使用——不是每次属性改变时——单独使用 useState 是行不通的。

但是，与前面的示例不同，useState 不仅仅返回一个变量。

它返回一个数组，其中状态变量作为第一个元素，一个用于更新变量值的函数作为第二个元素。

在 React Hooks 中更新useState

这是一个如何更新状态变量的示例。

 const React = () => { const [message, setMessage] = useState( '' ); return ( <div> <input type="text" value={message} placeholder="Enter a text" onChange={e => setMessage(e.target.value)} / </div> ); };

另一方面，此更新函数不会立即更新值。

重新渲染组件后useState参数将被忽略，该函数将返回最近的值或新的状态值。

使用状态变量作为对象：在useState() Hooks

如果我们像前面的示例一样向消息对象 (id) 添加另一个属性：

 const React = () => { const [messageObj, setMessage] = useState({ message: '', id: 1 }); return ( <div> <input type="text" value={messageObj.message} placeholder="Enter a message" onChange={e => { const newMessageObj = { message: e.target.value }; setMessage(newMessageObj); }} /> <p> <strong>{messageObj.id} : {messageObj.message}</strong> </p> </div> ); };

而且我们只更新message属性，就像上面的例子一样，React 将替换原来的状态对象：

使用onChange事件中使用的对象，该对象仅包含 message 属性：

 { message: 'message entered' } // id property is lost

您可以通过将要替换的对象作为函数参数传递并使用对象spread语法来复制 setState() 的行为：

 onChange={e => { const val = e.target.value; setMessage(prevState => { return { ...prevState, message: val } }); }}

在将spread语法应用于多维数组时，您必须小心，因为它不会像您预期的那样工作。

这导致我们在将对象作为状态工作时需要考虑另一件事。

在 React 钩子中更新状态：对于嵌套对象

在 JavaScript 中，多维数组是数组中的数组：

 [ ['value1','value2'], ['value3','value4'] ]

您可以使用它们来集中所有状态变量。 但是，最好使用嵌套对象来实现此目的：

 { 'row1' : { 'key1' : 'value1', 'key2' : 'value2' }, 'row2' : { 'key3' : 'value3', 'key4' : 'value4' } }

但是，当使用多维数组和嵌套对象时， spread语法和Object. assign 复制数组时， spread语法本质上会深入一层。 因此，如下例所示，它可能不适合复制多维数组。 但重要的一点是，在使用嵌套对象时，我们不能只使用扩展语法来更新状态对象。

例如，考虑以下状态对象：

 const [msgObj, setMsg] = useState({ author: '', msg: { id: 1, text: '' } });

以下代码片段显示了一些更新文本字段的错误方法：

 // Wrong setMsg(prevState => ({ ...prevState, text: 'My message' })); // Wrong setMsg(prevState => ({ ...prevState.msg, text: 'My message' })); // Wrong setMsg(prevState => ({ ...prevState, msg: { text: 'My message' } }));

为了正确更新文本字段，我们必须将原始对象的整个字段集/嵌套对象复制到一个新对象

// Correct setMsg(prevState => ({ ...prevState, msg: { ...prevState.msg, text: 'My message' } }));

同样，以下是更新状态对象的作者字段的方法：

 // Correct setMsg(prevState => ({ author: 'Joe', ...prevState.msg }));

假设消息对象没有改变。 如果它确实发生了变化，您必须以这种方式更新对象：

 // Correct setMsg(prevState => ({ author: 'Joe', msg: { ...prevState.msg, text: 'My message' } }));

结论

此函数获取初始状态并返回一个具有当前状态值的变量（不一定是起始状态）和另一个更新它的函数。



原文:


useState is a Hook that enables state variables to be used in functional components. This function takes the initial state and returns a variable with the current state value and another function to update it.

In React, there are two type of components class based and functional based. Functional components are simple functions that accept parameters as component properties and return valid JSX:

function React(props) {
  return <div>{props.useState}</div>
}
// Or as an arrow function
const React = (props) =>  <div>{props.useState}</div>

There are no state or lifecycle methods, as you can see.

React Hooks are the functions that add state variables to functional components. They usually begin with the keyword use.

How to use useState Hook in ReactJS? What does it do?

useState allows you to add state to function components, as previously indicated. When you use useState inside a function component, it creates a single piece of state for that component.

Whereas in a class, the state is always an object, Hooks' state can be any type. Each state item contains a single value, which can be an object, an array, a boolean, or any other kind you can think of.

So, when is it appropriate to utilize the useState Hook? It's particularly effective for the local component state, but larger projects may require the usage of additional state management methods.

Declaring{ useState }in your React App.

To use the UseState hook in your App simply type the following code:

import React, { useState } from 'react';

The useState Hook allows you to declare only one state variable (of any type) at a time, like this:

import React, { useState } from 'react';

const React= () => {
   const message = useState( '' );
   const listOfMessage = useState( [] );
}

useStatetakes the initial value of the state variable as an argument.

You can pass it directly, as shown in the previous example, or use a function to initialize the variable.

const Message= () => {
   const message = useState( () => helloWorld() );
}

The initial value will only be assigned on the first render and if it's a function, it will only be called on the first render.

The initial parameter of the useState Hook will be ignored in subsequent renders (due to a change of state in the component or a parent component) and the current value will be obtained.

Because its argument is only used for the first time — not every time the property changes — using useState alone won't work.

However, unlike the previous examples, useState does not just return a variable.

It returns an array with the state variable as the first element and a function to update the variable's value as the second element.

Array destructuringis commonly used to simplify the code.

const React= () => {
   const [message, setMessage]= useState( '' );
}

Updating the useState in React Hooks

The second element returned by useState is a function that updates the state variable with a new value.

Here's an example of how to update the state variable.

const React = () => {
  const [message, setMessage] = useState( '' );

  return (
    <div>
      <input
         type="text"
         value={message}
         placeholder="Enter a text"
         onChange={e => setMessage(e.target.value)}
       /
  </div>
  );
};

This update function, on the other hand, does not immediately update the value.

  The useState parameter will be ignored after re-rendering the component, and this function will return the most recent value or the new state values.

Using state varibales as an object: In useState() Hooks

If we add another property to the message object (id) like in the previous example:

const React = () => {
  const [messageObj, setMessage] = useState({ message: '', id: 1 });

  return (
    <div>
      <input
        type="text"
        value={messageObj.message}
        placeholder="Enter a message"
        onChange={e => {
          const newMessageObj = { message: e.target.value };
          setMessage(newMessageObj); 
        }}
      />
      <p>
        <strong>{messageObj.id} : {messageObj.message}</strong>
      </p>
  </div>
  );
};

And we only update themessageproperty like in the above example, React will replace the original state object:

With the object used in the onChange event, which only contains the message property:

{ message: 'message entered' } // id property is lost

You may replicate the behavior of setState() by passing the object to be replaced as a function argument and using the object spread syntax:

onChange={e => {
  const val = e.target.value;
  setMessage(prevState => {
    return { ...prevState, message: val }
  });
}}

The ...prevState part will get all of the properties of the object and the message: value part will overwrite the messageproperty.

You just have to be careful when applying the spreadsyntax to multidimensional arrays because it won’t work as you might expect.

This leads us to another thing to consider when working with objects as the state.

Updating state in React hooks: For Nested objects

In JavaScript, multidimensional arrays are arrays within arrays:

[
  ['value1','value2'],
  ['value3','value4']
]

You could use them to centralize all of your state variables. However, it is preferable to use nested objects for this purpose:

{
  'row1' : {
    'key1' : 'value1',
    'key2' : 'value2'
  },
  'row2' : {
    'key3' : 'value3',
    'key4' : 'value4'
  }
}

However, when working with multidimensional arrays and nested objects, the spread syntax and Object. assign will create a shallow copy rather than a deep copy.

When copying an array, the spreadsyntax essentially goes one level deep. As a result, as the following example shows, it may not be suited for copying multidimensional arrays. (The same is true for spread syntax and Object.assign().)

let a = [[1], [2], [3]];
let b = [...a];

b.shift().shift(); //  1
//  Array 'a' is affected as well: [[], [2], [3]]

but the important point is that when using nested objects, we can’t just use the spread syntax to update the state object.

For example, consider the following state object:

const [msgObj, setMsg] = useState({
  author: '',
  msg: {
    id: 1,
    text: ''
  }
});

The following code snippets show some incorrect ways to update the text field:

// Wrong
setMsg(prevState => ({
  ...prevState,
  text: 'My message'
}));

// Wrong
setMsg(prevState => ({
  ...prevState.msg,
  text: 'My message'
}));

// Wrong
setMsg(prevState => ({
  ...prevState,
  msg: {
    text: 'My message'
  }
}));

To properly update the text field, we have to copy to a new object the entire set of fields/nested objects of the original object

// Correct
setMsg(prevState => ({
  ...prevState,      
  msg: {             
    ...prevState.msg, 
    text: 'My message'    
  }
}));

In the same way, here’s how you’d update the author field of the state object:

// Correct
setMsg(prevState => ({
  author: 'Joe',      
  ...prevState.msg  
}));

Assuming the message object doesn’t change. If it does change, you’d have to update the object this way:

// Correct
setMsg(prevState => ({
  author: 'Joe',         
  msg: {              
    ...prevState.msg, 
    text: 'My message'    
  }
}));

Conculsion

useState is a Hook (function) that enables state variables to be used in functional components. This function takes the initial state and returns a variable with the current state value (not necessarily the starting state) and another function to update it.

Items.Title: 将遗留应用程序现代化以成为未来的业务 | Modernize legacy apps to be the business of the future
Items.Description:
技术瞬息万变，遗留应用程序无法与当今的数字世界竞争。 因此，组织正在选择遗留应用程序现代化。 对遗留应用程序进行现代化改造不必局限于将遗留系统迁移到新的 IT 生态系统。 相反，它是采用混合数字技术来应对不断变化的商业环境以保持竞争力。

许多公司仍在使用旧的 IT 系统。 结果是效率低下、数据管理不善以及整个组织流程的灵活性降低。 因此，公司需要使用云、数据科学、网络安全进步和应用程序接口 (API) 等先进技术对遗留应用程序进行现代化改造，以提高性能。

遗留应用程序现代化的挑战

由于灵活性、成本、可用性、可访问性、安全性等各种挑战，公司避免对其遗留应用程序进行现代化改造。遗留应用程序现代化的其他艰巨挑战是 -

  • 缺乏用于保护业务和用户数据免受潜在安全威胁的内置安全功能
  • 由于单体架构，应用程序与 Web 和移动协议及 API 不兼容
  • 需要具有良好资源和知识的经验丰富的旧版应用程序现代化合作伙伴
  • 将遗留应用程序迁移到新基础设施时的数据泄露和网络攻击

因此，组织需要一个防故障的现代化战略以及风险缓解路线图来处理遗留的现代化瓶颈。

现在您已经了解了遗留应用程序现代化的挑战，让我们讨论遗留现代化的不同方法。

重写——从头开始重写或重建代码或组件，而不改变它们的范围

替换 – 通过删除现有系统的部分内容来构建新系统，并考虑用新功能和要求替换它们

从这里阅读我们的完整帖子

本文最初由Softweb Solutions发布



原文:

Technology is changing rapidly and legacy applications cannot compete with today’s digital world. Therefore, organizations are choosing legacy application modernization. It is not necessary that modernizing legacy apps is limited to migrating legacy systems to the new IT ecosystem. Instead, it is the adoption of a mix of digital technologies for the changing business landscape to stay competitive.

Many companies still use old IT systems. The result is increased inefficiency, poor data management and less flexibility across organizational processes. So, companies need to modernize legacy applications using advanced technologies like the cloud, data science, cyber-security advancements and application program interfaces (API) for efficient performance.

The challenges of legacy app modernization

Companies avoid modernizing their legacy apps due to various challenges such as flexibility, cost, availability, accessibility, security, etc. Other daunting challenges of legacy app modernization are –

  • Lack of built-in security features to protect business and user data from potential security threats
  • Incompatibility of apps with web and mobile protocols and APIs due to monolithic architecture
  • Need for an experienced legacy app modernization partner with good resources and knowledge
  • Data breaches and cyber-attacks while migrating the legacy application to new infrastructure

Hence, organizations require a fail-proof modernization strategy along with a risk alleviation road-map to deal with legacy modernization bottlenecks.

Now that you are aware of the challenges of legacy application modernization, let’s discuss the different approaches to legacy modernization.

*Legacy modernization approaches
*
Rewrite – Rewrite or rebuild code or components from scratch without changing their scope

Rehost – Host applications to more advanced infrastructure for greater scalability and performance

Replace – Build a new system by removing parts of the existing system and consider replacing them with new features and requirements

Rearchitect – Build a new environment with new features and capabilities by modifying core technologies and architecture. Read our full post from here

Items.Title: Github README 中的 HTML？ | HTML in Github README?
Items.Description:
出于安全原因，github 会从 markdown 文件中删除大多数html 标签。

但是您可以插入图像：

 # HTML in Markdown! <img src= "./button.svg" alt= "" />

那你说呢？

您会注意到图像是 svg。

来自MDN ：

在浏览器的上下文中，它很可能是 (X)HTML。

现在，如果您查看button.svg的内容，您会喜欢这个技巧

<svg fill= "none" viewBox= "0 0 80 40" width= "80" height= "40" xmlns= "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" > <foreignObject width= "100%" height= "100%" > <div xmlns= "http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" > <style> button { margin : 0 ; width : 80px ; height : 40px ; border : none ; background-color : blue ; color : white ; border-radius : 5px ; font-size : 1rem ; font-weight : 800 ; } </style> <button> BUTTON </button> </div> </foreignObject> </svg>

是的！ 您可以使用 css 来设置样式。

在真正的 github repo中查看。

有关包括动画（！）的更复杂的示例，请参阅此 css-tricks 帖子

(mls) (毫升)



原文:

For safety reasons github strips most html tags out of markdown files.

But you can insert images:

# HTML in Markdown! <img src="./button.svg" alt="" />

So what you say?

You'll notice that the image is an svg.

Svg has a <foreignObject> element.
From MDN:

The SVG element includes elements from a different XML namespace. In the context of a browser, it is most likely (X)HTML.

Now if you look at the contents of button.svg you'll appreciate this trick

<svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 80 40" width="80" height="40" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <foreignObject width="100%" height="100%"> <div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"> <style> button { margin: 0; width: 80px; height: 40px; border: none; background-color: blue; color: white; border-radius: 5px; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; } </style> <button>BUTTON</button> </div> </foreignObject>
</svg>

And yes! you can use css to style.

See it in a real github repo.

For a more complex example including animations(!) see this css-tricks post

(mls)

Items.Title: 微软动态 365 指南 101 | Microsoft Dynamics 365 Guides 101
Items.Description:
远程工作已成为每个行业的需求，尤其是自从大流行袭击我们的生活以来。 在过去的几年里，每个人都意识到远程工作的必要性和重要性。 除了远程工作，远程培训也成为工作的重要组成部分。 原因很简单——适当的培训提供了应对复杂情况所需的知识和能力。 训练有素的员工可以提高组织的效率和生产力。

然而，远程提供培训是一项艰巨的任务。 当谈到在职培​​训时，它也变得至关重要。 它提供了在应用程序中完成任务的分步说明。 这可以通过两种方式完成：通过自动记录用户活动或专家手动输入。

它在整个正在进行的任务中为操作员提供全息指令。 它可以帮助他们在工作时学习并同时完成任务。 该应用程序会显示指示卡和指向要完成工作的确切位置的箭头。 它包括完成任务所需的图像、视频和 3D 全息模型。 并帮助技术人员查看确切需要完成的工作，从而更快地完成任务。

借助Dynamics 365 Guides 功能，您的技术人员可以最大限度地减少错误并快速解决问题。 如果需要，技术人员甚至可以拨打电话并与位于远程位置的专家联系以获得帮助。 由于专家可以通过 HoloLens 准确地看到技术人员看到的内容，因此他们可以指导技术人员相应地执行任务。 在此处阅读我们的更多文章



原文:

Working remotely has become the need of every industry, especially ever since the pandemic has hit our lives. In the last couple of years, everyone has realized the need and importance of remote work. Along with working remotely, remote training has also become an important part of the job. The reason is simple – proper training provides the knowledge and ability required to tackle complex situations. Well-trained employees increase the efficiency and productivity of the organization.

However, providing training remotely is a difficult task. And when it comes to on-job training, it becomes crucial too. Microsoft Dynamics 365 Guides, a new mixed reality application from Microsoft, is designed to help people learn how to use various business applications. It provides step-by-step instructions to complete a task within the applications. This can be done in two ways: either through automatic recording of user activity or manual inputs from experts.

It provides holographic instructions to operators throughout an ongoing task. It helps them learn while they’re at work and complete the task simultaneously. The app displays instruction cards and arrows pointed towards the exact place where the work is to be done. It includes images, videos, and 3D holographic models required to accomplish a task. And helps technicians to view what exactly needs to be done, leading to faster completion of the task.

With Dynamics 365 Guides capabilities your technicians can minimize errors and provide quick resolution of issues. The technicians can even make a call and connect with an expert located in a remote location for assistance if required. And since the expert can exactly see what the technician sees through their HoloLens, they can guide a technician to perform a task accordingly. Read our More Article Here

Items.Title: 了解面部识别和情绪检测工具的好处 | Know the benefits of facial recognition and emotion detection tools
Items.Description:
面部识别和情绪检测是基于人工智能的系统，用于验证和识别目的。 人工智能使这些系统能够识别面部和声音以及分析情绪。

这些技术彼此相似但又略有不同。 面部识别系统是一种使用面部识别和检查人的身份的方法。 它也有助于识别照片、视频和面对面的人。 它映射一个人的面部特征，并使用生物识别软件将它们存储为面部指纹。

另一方面，情绪检测识别和分析人类情绪。 它通过提取有关情绪状态的信息来帮助检测某人的感受。

了解了面部识别是什么之后，现在让我们了解为什么我们需要这种技术以及它如何帮助公司
面部识别软件是有史以来最强大的监控工具之一。 虽然它通常用于锁定智能手机或排列图片，但该工具具有完成更大目的的潜力。 公司使用这些工具的方式将极大地影响我们的生活。

这种技术的功能首先是在需要监视的地方安装摄像机。 多个安装的摄像头在检测到移动时会连续拍照并录制视频。

人脸识别软件的工作原理
面部识别系统分为四种类型的技术：

  1. 人脸检测
    它是一种基于人工智能的技术，有助于识别图像中的人脸。 它使用面部表情来识别图像或视频的各个部分，以确定年龄、性别和情绪。 该技术可应用于安全、生物指标、执法等领域，用于跟踪和监视目的。

  2. 面部分析
    面部分析软件通过测量眼睛之间的空间、鼻子和嘴唇之间的间隙、下巴的形状等来绘制面部特征，然后进行数学转换，并将它们存储为“面部指纹”。

  3. 面部识别
    这是一种使用人脸确认个人身份的方法。 它可以是照片、视频或实时的。 它还有助于验证过程。 如前所述，它是生物识别安全的一个类别。

  4. 情绪分析
    情绪分析软件分析一个人的面部表情。 它通过分析在他们的口头和非口头交流中收集的数据来记录他们的情绪、态度和情感个性。 情绪分析告诉人们的感受和原因。 它提供了深入的上下文理解以及有价值的见解，以识别和解决问题。 立即阅读我们的文章

这篇文章最初由Softweb Solutions发布

达斯·埃斯普雷修斯—— Jan 30 1月30日

Yuichiro Tachibana (Tsuchiya) - Yuichiro Tachibana（土屋） - Jan 13 1月13日



原文:

Facial recognition and emotion detection are AI-based systems used for verification and recognition purposes. Artificial intelligence enables these systems to recognize faces and voices as well as analyze emotions.

These technologies are similar yet slightly different from each other. Facial recognition system is a method of recognizing and checking a person’s identity using their face. It helps to identify people in photographs, videos and in-person as well. It maps a person’s facial features and stores them as a face print using the bio metric software.

On the other hand, emotion detection identifies and analyzes human emotions. It helps to detect how someone feels by extracting information about their emotional state.

Having known what facial recognition is, let’s now understand why we need this technique and how it helps companies
Facial recognition software is one of the most competent surveillance tools ever made. Though it is commonly used to lock smartphones or arrange pictures, this tool has the potential to accomplish bigger purposes. And the way companies are using these tools, will impact our lives significantly.

Functioning of this technique starts with camera installation over the place that needs to be under surveillance. Multiple installed cameras continuously take pictures and record videos when they detect movement.

How face recognition software works
Facial recognition systems are categorized under four types of technologies:

  1. Face detection
    It is an AI-based technology that helps to identify human faces in images. It uses facial expressions to identify parts of an image or video to determine age, gender and emotions. This technology can be applied to fields like security, bio metrics, law enforcement, etc., for tracking and surveillance purposes.

  2. Facial analysis
    Facial analysis software maps facial features by measuring the space between the eyes, the gap between nose and lips, the shape of chin, etc., converts them mathematically, and stores them as ‘face prints’.

  3. Facial recognition
    It is a method used to confirm an individual’s identity using their face. It can be in a photograph, video or in real-time. It also helps in verification processes. As mentioned before, it is a category of bio metric security.

  4. Emotion analytics
    The emotion analytics software analyzes a person’s facial expression. It records their mood, attitude and emotional personality by analyzing the data collected on their verbal as well as non-verbal communications. Emotional analytics tells what people are feeling and why. It provides deep and contextual understanding with valuable insights to identify and resolve issues. Read our article now

Darth Espressius - Jan 30

Yuichiro Tachibana (Tsuchiya) - Jan 13

Items.Title: JavaScirpt 中的闭包 | Closures in JavaScirpt
Items.Description:
普里塔姆库马尔

发表于大家好！ 希望你们一切都好。

目录

  • 什么是范围？
  • 什么是全局、块和函数范围？
  • 什么是词法作用域？
  • 什么是闭包？

在这个博客中，我将写关于闭包的文章，这是 JavaScript 中令人困惑的话题之一。 而且我相信每个 JavaScript 程序员在学习 JavaScript 语言时都会遇到这个名字。

更好地理解闭包。 这是了解的先决条件。 但是如果你不知道这些概念也不要担心，我也在写这些主题，例如上面提到的范围，块范围，函数范围，词法范围。

让我们从范围开始。

范围

让我们通过例子来理解。

 let a = "JavaScript"; console.log(a); // JavaScirpt

在上面的示例中，它可以很容易地访问。 没关系，但是如果我们在 if 块中声明一个变量。 

 if (true) { let a = 'JavaScript'; } console.log(a); // ReferenceError: a is not defined

上面的示例将抛出一个 ReferenceError: a is not defined，因为，如果代码块创建的范围具有只能在该块内访问的变量。

全球范围

如果该变量声明在任何其他范围之外，并且该变量可以访问任何其他范围。

 var a = 5; var b = 5; function sum() { if (true) { const sum = a + b; console.log(sum); // 10 } } sum();

在上面的示例中，我声明了两个变量 a、b 并赋值为 5。在其他范围内访问的全局变量，这就是它记录 sum = 10 的原因

块范围

在 ES6 引入的时候，JavaScirpt 中引入了两个新的关键字 let 和 const 来声明变量，都是块作用域关键字。 那只能在该块内访问。

 if (true) { const message = 'Hello JavaScript'; console.log(message); // 'Hello JavaScript' } console.log(message); // ReferenceError

在第一个日志中，它打印 Hello JavaScript，因为我们正在该块内部访问，但是如果我们尝试在块外部访问它会抛出一个 ReferenceError。

注意：- 代码块，同时也创建块范围。

注意： - var 不是块作用域。

 if (true) { var message = 'Hello JavaScript'; } console.log(message); 'Hello JavaScript'

在 var 关键字的情况下，如果 {} 代码块不创建范围。 这就是我们在 if 块之外访问消息变量的原因。

功能范围

词法作用域

让我们从一个例子开始

let myName = 'Pritam'; function one() { let age = 15; function two() { let address = 'Hazaribagh'; let bio = `My name is ${myName}. and age is ${age}, and Address is ${address}`; console.log(bio); // My name is Pritam. and age is 15, and Address is Hazaribagh } two(); } one();

在上面的例子中

函数 two() 可以访问它的父范围变量，
也可以访问全局范围的变量。 但是如何？ 函数作用域如何访问它的外部函数作用域。 让我们了解一下。

答案是因为词法范围/词法环境

在词法作用域的概念中，内部函数可以访问外部函数的作用域。

但它是如何工作的？ 在 JavaScript 中，每当创建一个函数时，由于内部隐藏属性 [[Environment]]，它会引用它的词法变量。

注意：所有函数都有 [[Environment]] 属性。



原文:

Pritam Kumar

Posted on May 19

Hello, Everyone! Hope You all are doing well.

Table of Contents

  • What is Scope?
  • What is Global, Block and Function scope?
  • What is Lexical Scope?
  • What is Closures?

In this Blog, I'll be writing about Closures, one of the confusing topic in JavaScript. And I'm sure that every JavaScript programmer encountered this name while learning JavaScript Language.

To understand Closures in better way. Here's is come prerequisites to know. But don't worry if you don't know these concepts, I'm also writing about these Topics Such as Scope, Block scope, Function scope, Lexical Scope as mentioned above.

Let's Start with Scope.

Scope

The simple meaning of Scope is accessibility of variable from where is defined in JavaScript program.

Let's Understand with example.

 let a = "JavaScript";
 console.log(a); // JavaScirpt

In the above example, It can be easily accessible. That's ok But If we declare a variable inside a if block.

if (true) {
  let a = 'JavaScript';
}

console.log(a); //  ReferenceError: a is not defined

The above example will throw an ReferenceError: a is not defined, Because, if code block created scope with variable that only accessible inside that block only.

Global Scope

If The variable declared outside of any other scope, and that variable can be access to any other scope.

var a = 5;
var b = 5;

function sum() {
  if (true) {
    const sum = a + b;
    console.log(sum); // 10
  }
}
sum();

In the above example, I declare two variable a, b and assign a value 5. The global variable accessed inside other scope, That's why it logs sum = 10

Block Scope

When ES6 Introduced, Two new keyword were introduced to declare variable in JavaScirpt let and const, Both are block scope keyword. That can be only access inside that block only.

if (true) {
  const message = 'Hello JavaScript';
  console.log(message); // 'Hello JavaScript'
}
console.log(message); // ReferenceError

In the first log, It prints Hello JavaScript, because we are accessing inside that block but if we try to access outside of block it will throw an ReferenceError.

Note:- The code block for, while also create block scope.

Note: - var is not block scope.

if (true) {
  var message = 'Hello JavaScript';
}
console.log(message); 'Hello JavaScript'

In case of var keyword, if {} code block does not create a scope. That's why we're accessed message variable outside of the if block.

Function Scope

A JavaScript functions create scope with all variables (let, const, and var) that are only accessible inside that function body.

function sum() {
  var a = 5;
  let b = 5;
  const c = 5;
}
sum();

console.log(a, b, c); // ReferenceError: a is not defined

Lexical Scope

Let's start with an example

let myName = 'Pritam';

function one() {
  let age = 15;

  function two() {
    let address = 'Hazaribagh';

    let bio = `My name is ${myName}. and age is ${age}, and Address is ${address}`;

    console.log(bio); // My name is Pritam. and age is 15, and Address is Hazaribagh

  }

  two();
}

one();

In the Above Example

The function two() can access of it's Parent scopes variables,
also can access variable of global scope. But How? How a function scope has access of it's outer function scope. Let's know about it.

The answer is Because of Lexical scope / Lexical Environment

In the concept of Lexical scope, inner function has access of outer function's scopes.

But How it works? , How it remembers?

In JavaScript, Whenever a function created, It make reference of it's lexical variable due to an internal hidden property [[Environment]].

Note: All function has [[Environment]] property.
